java-configuration/pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven groupId from 'nl.theexperts.keycloak' to 'nl.the_experts.keycloak' to align with package naming conventions.
Explicitly defined maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target properties using a java.version variable.
Added the keycloak-admin-client dependency to enable programmatic interaction with the Keycloak Admin API.
Added the keycloak-core dependency to access core Keycloak classes and utilities.
Added the keycloak-services dependency to access Keycloak service implementations.
Added the resteasy-core dependency to provide the core JAX-RS implementation.
Added the resteasy-client dependency to enable JAX-RS client functionality.
Added the resteasy-jackson2-provider dependency to handle JSON serialization/deserialization via Jackson.
Added the resteasy-multipart-provider dependency to support multipart form data handling.
Added the Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Added the JUnit Jupiter engine dependency to support JUnit 5 test execution.
Added the JUnit Jupiter params dependency to support parameterized tests.
Added the Mockito core dependency to enable mocking in unit tests.
Added the Mockito JUnit Jupiter dependency to integrate Mockito with JUnit 5.
Added the AssertJ core dependency to provide fluent assertions for tests.
Added the JUnit Pioneer dependency to access additional JUnit 5 extensions and utilities.
Added the Maven JAR plugin configuration to manage JAR packaging.
Added the Maven Shade plugin to create an executable uber-jar with specific resource transformers and filters.

keycloak/pom.xml.general_idea: Added keycloak-quarkus-dist dependency to include the Keycloak distribution.
Added keycloak-quarkus-server dependency to include Keycloak server libraries.
Added resteasy-core dependency for JAX-RS implementation.
Added resteasy-client dependency for JAX-RS client support.
Added resteasy-jackson2-provider dependency for JSON processing.
Added resteasy-multipart-provider dependency for multipart form support.
Added asm dependency for bytecode manipulation.
Added asm-commons dependency for bytecode manipulation utilities.
Added asm-util dependency for bytecode manipulation utilities.
Added asm-tree dependency for bytecode manipulation tree API.
Added quarkus-vertx dependency for Vert.x integration.
Added quarkus-vertx-http dependency for HTTP support in Vert.x.
Added vertx-core dependency for core Vert.x functionality.
Added quarkus-maven-plugin to build the Quarkus application.
Renamed parent groupId from nl.theexperts.keycloak to nl.the_experts.keycloak.

pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven groupId to use underscores instead of dots for compliance or naming convention.
Updated the target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Bumped maven-surefire-plugin to a newer stable version compatible with modern JUnit 5.
Bumped maven-shade-plugin to a newer version.
Bumped maven-jar-plugin to a newer version.
Added explicit version management for maven-dependency-plugin.
Added explicit version management for maven-compiler-plugin to ensure consistent compilation settings.
Upgraded Keycloak version from 20.0.3 to 23.0.1, which likely requires Java 21 and new dependencies.
Upgraded Quarkus version from 2.13.3.Final to 3.2.9.Final, a major version jump requiring Java 17+ (and often 21 for latest features).
Removed the separate quarkus.resteasy.version property as Resteasy is now managed differently or integrated into Quarkus 3.
Added explicit version management for Jandex, likely to resolve conflicts with Keycloak/Quarkus upgrades.
Added explicit version management for ASM libraries to resolve dependency conflicts.
Added explicit version management for Resteasy libraries, decoupling from Quarkus default management.
Added Lombok as a managed dependency for code generation.
Added explicit version management for JUnit Jupiter.
Added explicit version management for AssertJ.
Added explicit version management for Mockito.
Added explicit version management for JUnit Pioneer.
Excluded transitive Resteasy dependencies from keycloak-quarkus-server to manage versions explicitly.
Excluded transitive Jandex dependencies from keycloak-quarkus-server to manage versions explicitly.
Excluded transitive ASM dependencies from keycloak-quarkus-server to manage versions explicitly.
Excluded transitive Quarkus Vertx dependencies from keycloak-quarkus-server to manage versions explicitly.
Excluded transitive Resteasy dependencies from keycloak-admin-client to manage versions explicitly.
Excluded transitive Resteasy multipart provider from keycloak-services to manage versions explicitly.
Added explicit dependency for resteasy-core with managed version.
Added explicit dependency for resteasy-client with managed version.
Added explicit dependency for resteasy-jackson2-provider with managed version.
Added explicit dependency for resteasy-multipart-provider with managed version.
Added explicit dependencies for ASM libraries with managed version.
Added explicit dependency for quarkus-vertx with exclusions to manage transitive dependencies.
Added explicit dependency for quarkus-vertx-http with exclusions to manage transitive dependencies.
Added explicit dependency for vertx-core to resolve exclusions.
Added Lombok dependency for code generation.
Added explicit JUnit Jupiter dependencies for testing.
Added AssertJ dependency for testing.
Added Mockito dependencies for testing.
Added JUnit Pioneer dependency for testing.
Configured maven-compiler-plugin to use the new Java version properties.
Added maven-resources-plugin with explicit version.
Configured maven-surefire-plugin to use JUnit 5 engine and tree reporter.
Configured maven-surefire-plugin reporting format and console output.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the local environment configuration file to gitignore to prevent committing sensitive or environment-specific variables.

step-by-step-guide.md.general_idea: Explicitly list Java 17, Docker Desktop, and Maven as prerequisites for the guide.
step-by-step-guide.md.human_impl: Added bullet points for Java 17, Docker Desktop, and Maven under Prerequisites.

step-by-step-guide.md.general_idea: Change the Maven groupId from 'nl.theexperts.keycloak' to 'nl.the_experts.keycloak' to match package naming conventions.
step-by-step-guide.md.human_impl: Replaced 'nl.theexperts.keycloak' with 'nl.the_experts.keycloak' in mvn commands and pom.xml snippets.

step-by-step-guide.md.general_idea: Update the Keycloak version property from 20.0.3 to 20.0.5 in the parent POM.
Add instructions and configuration for including the Keycloak distribution as a Maven dependency instead of using a base image.
step-by-step-guide.md.human_impl: Added 'The Keycloak Distribution' and 'Updating the Keycloak submodule' sections with new pom.xml content for keycloak-quarkus-dist.

step-by-step-guide.md.general_idea: Introduce a custom Dockerfile using a multi-stage build with UBI8 and Java 17 to containerize the Keycloak distribution.
step-by-step-guide.md.human_impl: Added a Dockerfile snippet using registry.access.redhat.com/ubi8-minimal:8.7 and java-17-openjdk-headless.

step-by-step-guide.md.general_idea: Add a docker-compose.yml file to orchestrate the Keycloak service with a PostgreSQL database.
step-by-step-guide.md.human_impl: Added docker-compose.yml with postgres:14.4 and keycloak services.

step-by-step-guide.md.general_idea: Provide commands to build the project and launch the containerized Keycloak instance.
step-by-step-guide.md.human_impl: Added 'Launching Keycloak' section with 'mvn clean package && docker compose up'.
